title: Section 2
content: In this Act, unless there is anything repugnant in the subject or context,-- (a) "Court" includes a Coroner and any officer lawfully exercising civil, criminal or revenue jurisdiction; and (b) "prison" includes any place which has been declared by the State Government, by general or special order, to be a subsidiary jail. 1[(c) "States" means the territories to which this Act extends.]
footnote: 1. N.E.P.A. by Reg. 3 of 1960, s. 3 and the Schedule. The Act has been extended to--
